title: Moldyfishy's Baby Mobs
description: This mod adds a baby creeper
body:
**Join my server if u would like there I'll make updates about this mod and my other mods (future ones included)
Geckolib needed
-Baby Creeper Introduced

-Can be tamed with gunpowder

-Can be crafted

-Will follow you everywhere you go as your little talisman

-Currently just a pet it isn't very useful

-Has adorable animations

-Hisses to scare you, but doesn't blow up

-Gives resistance to you because he loves his owner
-Install Geckolib!**
